request_summary: Review the starter interactive lifecycle prototype before treating it as the default discovery walkthrough surface.
user_flow_summary: The PM should move from a seeded lifecycle item into stage evidence, gate outcomes, and PRD handoff readiness without reconstructing context from multiple docs first.
information_architecture_summary: Timeline, current stage, gate evidence, and downstream handoff state should be distinct but visible in one coherent review surface.
interaction_model_summary: The prototype should support an interactive walkthrough of one lifecycle item with clear entry points into evidence and explicit markers for deferred downstream work.
quality_summary: The starter prototype is detailed and credible enough for discovery walkthroughs, but it still needs more interaction polish before it can count as a top-tier product reference.

quality_dimension_reviews.rationale: The PM can move through the lifecycle review path, but artifact inspection should feel faster and more direct.
The walkthrough matches a real discovery-to-handoff review pattern rather than a decorative demo.
Current state and evidence are visible, but deferred downstream work needs stronger visual separation.
The prototype keeps validation evidence visible and avoids hiding the approval boundary behind visual polish.
The prototype feels purposeful, but it is not yet refined enough to serve as a world-class benchmark example.
The structure is understandable in docs and plain text, though status cues still need more redundancy.

quality_reference_examples: A detailed lifecycle walkthrough that supports PM review without presenter narration
accessibility_considerations: Gate status meaning should not depend only on color or motion.
The same lifecycle hierarchy should remain understandable in plain text and markdown review docs.
trust_considerations: The prototype should separate validated evidence from aspirational future-product behavior.
PRD handoff readiness should be traceable to visible validation artifacts instead of visual confidence alone.
improvement_actions: Increase evidence-preview density so the PM can inspect more without leaving the main flow.
Refine the visual hierarchy around current stage, passed gates, and deferred work in the next iteration.
